When it happened to multiple users today it was after their Mac computers had been closed for the weekend. ## Action Performed: 1. Open a public room 2. Login into the App with a new account 2. Disable internet connection on the device. 3. Navigate to a chat and upload an attachment (image). 4. Verify that the image preview appears immediately in the chat. 5. Close/force-kill the app while still offline. 6. Reopen the app and then enable internet connection (refresh if needed). ## Expected Result: The attachment should remain visible in the chat after reopening the app offline, and once the device goes online it should sync and appear normally (without reduced opacity). ## Actual Result: The attachment uploaded while offline disappears after closing and reopening the app. It does not sync or appear once the internet connection is restored. ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: - [x] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [ ] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [ ] Windows: Chrome - [ ] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/e3c70e3c-dc53-4943-a47c-91750a12cab0 [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)

Create a Scan Expense inside this empty report by uploading a receipt 9. Immediately observe the message preview in the LHN and Search Router while the receipt is Scanning 10. Verify during Receipt Scanning both LHN and Search router show "Receipt scanning..." 11. Wait for the scanning to complete 12. title: [$250] Prevent AppReview modal from showing when another modal is already visible

labels.name: External
labels.description: Added to denote the issue can be worked on by a contributor

labels.name: Daily
labels.description: KSv2

labels.name: Help Wanted
labels.description: Apply this label when an issue is open to proposals by contributors

labels.name: Bug
labels.description: Something is broken. Auto assigns a BugZero manager.

body:
When the AppReview modal appears while another modal is already present, it causes layout issues. We need to add a check so that the AppReview modal is suppressed whenever any other modal is currently visible. **Current behavior:** AppReview modal can appear on top of or alongside other modals, resulting in broken/wrong layout. **Expected behavior:** If any other modal is already being displayed, the AppReview modal should not be shown. **Slack thread:** https://expensify.slack.com/archives/C07HPDRELLD/p1777899221743389
Issue OwnerCurrent Issue Owner: @shubham1206agra
